answers.contents:
根據窩小對西亞解夢文化片面而不合理的理解，一個虔誠的穆斯林做這樣的夢，有可能是體驗到了一部分真主與天使對他所作所為的一些悲傷情感。從經驗上看，做這樣夢的穆斯林最常見的是近期犯了兩類罪行中的至少一種，因而才會引發悲傷的色調。

一種是用自己的力量幫助了惡人，導致惡人造成了更大破壞、或者傷害了很多好人。還有一種是明明自己有力量打擊與遏制身邊的惡人，可是卻由於沒判斷好或者猶豫不決，使得惡人沒有及時被懲辦。

如果做這樣夢的穆斯林能夠反省近期的做為，讀《古蘭經》和六大《聖訓》，找出正確判斷的標準、修復自己與先知穆罕默德的關係，那麼就應該能夠遏止靈界的悲傷氛圍。並且在將來的夢境中，看見歡快的火焰鎮尼們一同歌唱，而且自己靈魂周圍的環境也再次得到天堂芬芳的眷顧。

真主願您平安。

discussions.content: 谢谢你的帮助，Salam Alaikum.

@尼德兰:《古蘭經》4:58：「真主確切地命令你們，把一切信任交給值得信任的人。真主又命令你們，在原告與被告間判決的時候，要公正判決。真主給你們的勸誡何其美好！真主確切是全然沒有聽不到的、全然沒有看不到的。」
“Indeed, Allah commands you to render trusts to whom they are due and when you judge between people to judge with justice. Excellent is that which Allah instructs you. Indeed, Allah is ever Hearing and Seeing.” -- Surat An-Nisa 4:58

天哪，你的回答是正确的。
这里有很多邪恶...... 他到底是吸收了多少邪恶，以至于如此惊恐......

他不小心接收到了许多邪恶的感情，感受到了，
https://pincong.rocks/video/item_id-71296
而这种接受是很有难度的，就像是需要发报机才能接受信号一样。天哪，这是造了什么孽

@Nederland:为什么这么电影蕴含着这么强烈的能量呢....
我认为，那些能量巨大的东西，需要很小心.... （所以我反思了很久那种看到布尔什维克就要屠光的那类，觉得这也是走不通的）

answers.contents:
本闹钟从中嗅出了一点奇怪的cognitive style的气息。

毕竟纯数学+宗教，在一个人身上出现，至少放在中国，不是很常见。在中国，Scientific thinking is the new religion/God.

而且，一旦在梦中思考了，那么基本上人就快醒了。如果人没醒，那么这个睡眠不但得不到休息，甚至比不睡觉还累。

还有，lucid dream 这种，一般人如果遇到，最好调整好作息，补充营养，多晒太阳。一定要户外活动。

因为，这玩意太伤身体了。以至于在中世纪的世界，无论是亚洲还是欧洲，都认为是在被wizard吸食精气。

discussions.content:
我一直lucid dream,
简直是恐怖，恐怖片都不用了，自己做梦就是
lucid dream里自己受困，被杀死，被摔死，溺亡，被阉割，强奸，被性虐，凌辱，走投无路，甚至是参与战争，
以至于后来我有了复杂的方式来故意导致lucid dream崩溃来解救自己。虽然意识到在做梦，但是痛苦是真切的。

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:  下面你听听即可，可以不信，一种观点而已：
Lucid dream 在宗教中属于一种被spiritual world 骚扰的scenario,
因为很多人清楚地感觉到那确实有东西在周围，还能和你交互动作
当然，科学解释是幻觉，
也说了，没人知道答案，科学解释漏洞也百出，

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:
不过你学数学的，搞不懂为什么充满了spiritual thinking
这只有在中世纪才有的
近代工业革命以后，很少有同时学数学还如此religious

@snowingnight:我学心理学，是辅修。但是最后学到了研究变态和性学方向。
我搞工业和心理学没关系......
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:很抱歉和你说，但是你的脱离上下文的对话方式已经让两个人认为你就是我了。我希望下次你能让听者知道你谈话的背景是什么，你和这个主题的关系是什么。

@Nederland:天呐，我也在想这个问题....
为什么会把我当成是你！？
（好像还不止是两位。只是在这个帖子里出现了两次，我记得以前也有过..... ）
其实我想说，我都想在profile page加上注释，我不是Nederland，但是我觉得这样很愚蠢：因为你早就被一些不怀好意的人过多的加上了注意力，而我在很努力得避免吸引注意力，这样做适得其反.... ( •_•)

我的话，有人看来可能我很irreligious，因为我并不专业在宗教的正规解释上，而且我没有一般的穆斯林一样“保守糟粕”。但我其实很religious，对于绝对性的正义真理是坚持的，而且我坚持神的存在。
借维特根斯坦的说法，世界是所有给定事实的集合体。一般人的做法是，用探索真相的态度、用简单相信也好，去【得知】这个世界内部的事实包括“耶稣复活”、“安拉降下神谕”等宗教事件。那么通常各种有神论者和无神论者就是在求知方面有不同见解；我的做法却是在世界给定事实【之外】再引入关于宗教的事件，并视它们和原本的世界为一体，不需要否定任何现实的东西，定义一个新的世界。这在数学上是可行的，就像我们理所应当可以做函数延拓一样；而我是否自己已经规定好了神会怎么做？不，祂的决策首先对我是未知的，我要通过学习来得知祂的旨意，而且我只是根据概念的定义走到了祂面前，而不是告诉了祂怎么做，“规定”是一种语言表达习惯而已。
对于现实世界【内部】的关于神和宗教的话题，我的答复是“未知”（不是不可知论的永远未知，那是一个缺乏逻辑和证据的断言而已），在我对严谨要求的标准上，当前科学认知和他人声称的特殊经验还不足以用来宣称哪个宗教是对的或关于它们的否定命题是对的，但是我能从三大亚伯拉罕宗教的事物那里感受到一种对我个人的引导（所有线索可能是指向其中某种特定的宗教，但我不确定）；或许现实世界内部有神，而祂在给我引导，我对现实世界外部的构想也是引导的一部分，这是我自己的一种特殊经验。
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:伊斯兰教地区当前水平太低，还需要向俄国学习（你已经知道这是一种什么评价了，看到这里时），除了科索沃和波斯尼亚。科索沃和波斯尼亚则需要向克罗地亚和斯洛文尼亚学习，和意大利、奥地利的文明程度还远着呢。

@Nederland:哎，向俄国学习。当俄国都显得比较文明的时候.................（此刻泛斯拉夫又蠢蠢欲动了，自我感觉立刻好了起来，我们是欧洲人，欧洲人！）
而Croatia在独立后，当地居民把Yugo汽车纷纷卖了（通常卖给了Serbia居民，以至于现在Croatia现在很少那玩意儿）去买Skoda，就和Slovenia一样，满街Skoda，看来这个归属差距还是蛮大的。
@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:我会说土耳其语，而且有社会关系在伊斯坦布尔，这是你知道的。然而，当他们听说我觉得土耳其还不够自由时，很惊讶，“你不也是我们自己人吗？”(*^_^*)活像serbians见到croats搞意大利洋人的那一套后的反应。

@Nederland:哎，真是恶习难改....
土耳其现在这模样，都要变成下一个被我锤的对象了（提供物资给俄国）
现在这个时代真是大分裂大倒退啊。 90年代到2010s的相对自由简直如同做梦一样：在中国，土耳其，俄国竟然那个时候能讨论同性恋合法化？竟然还有人觉得有可能合法化？？？哈哈哈哈，
今天看来，当时真是想多了。
自己人？  被某些人觉得是自己人的时候，那可就大事不好了。
https://pincong.rocks/article/item_id-1246745
本来是出于信任，关系亲密，扒裤子，捏睾丸，拍打屁股，结果后来产生了矛盾一步步升级，直接对着性器官打到昏迷，直接羞辱到上吊，或者谋杀一样。如果是这样，还不如一开始就不是“自己人”呢..... （我我我我，我，我只是路人！我不是斯拉夫兄弟，我是跑来买巧克力的！）

@Nederland:如何学习来得知神的旨意？
如果神的旨意基本上是未知的，那么绝对性的道德观念是否也是未知的？

@Nederland:Thank you for the reply.
1. Can you give any example(s)?
2. I see. My reasoning was, I regard "absolute" to be an essence of God in this context, so if God is unknown, then absolute morality is also unknown. You also mentioned your firm belief in the absolute justice, which is related to morality.
Regarding the art analogy, do you mean that God's will is like an official guide to the real world, but other ways used by humans are also permitted? If this understanding is correct, it seems to me to contradict the principles of absolute justice and morality, especially when they are unknown to humans.

@游民:Wspaniały, now I'll talk about the main things around our topic and make things as simple and clear as possible.
1, Sure, although most (if not all) of the cases are too complicated to show, I can give you a simplified comparison. Some said that they obtained faith in God after surviving a heart attack or something during which they thought of Jesus and turned to him for help, and they changed their life style when they saw some coincidences, like, finding a bible in an old closet right after the life deciding surgery and opening it at the very page talking about abstaining from a specific bad habit which was diagnosed as the disease cause. For me, I might do the similar, it's just not about whether my God is Allah, but what he illuminates to me, and that will be one way how I conduct inductive reasoning.
2, I know your reasoning steps, just this one, which lots of philosophers might use, thank you for your kindness to make it ensured. It's brilliant yet there's a huge gap between this and things I worked with on religion, so first of all please pardon me for letting you fill it mostly by yourself, and my advice is that you can leave those philosophy things aside and check the steps again mathematically and carefully, including the definition part. Here's just ONE question to start for instance: even if everything in (not "about") the content of God's will is unknown and God is absolute, is it ok to assume a statement to be unknown truth value wise, just because the truth value is absolute?
Beside that, I really appreciate your interest in my analogy, but I'm afraid that's not the case. I wanted to say, God's will shows how he manages the functioning of the world, and what's the moral(I mean moral of a story, not the phrases about morality in it) of the world. For most part of this, I believe anyone is permitted (in my morality, I don't really use such word or idea, since I think it's not detailed and rigorous enough) to make other beliefs.
And now let's talk about ethics aka moral or morality (again, I never say everything about it stays unknown, I believe many things should be known and can be known if you simply allow your empathy, mercy and other emotions that help you observe the world and make inductive reasoning to work with you), I think moral truth is one and only. You're permitted to give an inaccurate assumption when it comes the perspective of tooling, just like you're permitted to leave a possibility of wrong when you're doing the hypothesis or the induction step during natural science research, but you're not permitted morally and you're wrong (I mean logically wrong here, and absoluteness of a truth is about whether you're just wrong, when you claim something wrong), and I'm also permitted to judge that you're wrong both morally and formally. By the way I agree at least upon one thing with Christianity, that is, we're all wicked due to stupidity, although we can be righteous on infinite things.
Nah, you know, such topic can be really complicated, and I hope my answer can be helpful somewhat, but I guess I can hardly type such long text anymore recently. And due to my divergence from the professional philosophers' world, too many are things needing to be explained, and I hope to leave more space for you to think, instead of dictating things to you, I guess that's it on today's topic.

@游民:BTW it seems I omitted to explain something, now I will add it here for you to better understand the reply above. To me, the nature of making a judgement that is unnecessarily true(mathematically speaking) based on some given facts, let's call it "rough reasoning" or "guessing", is the same as inductive reasoning. Rough reasoning can also be interpreted as claiming a larger pile of events/things/statements to be true based on the pattern(being within this larger picture can be seen as a pattern) you see in a smaller one.
Rough reasoning is a type of inductive reasoning, while inductive reasoning is also a type of rough reasoning. And obviously rough/inductive reasoning is all we're doing in science beside collecting data and deductive/mathematically legitimate reasoning.

@Nederland:I often make judgement by instinct. And it got me this far already....
I hope I still have the tacit with God to be blessed. As unlucky as I am in many things (people dying around me, bullying, rape or so), at least coming to life and death moments or pivotal time, I am treated with mercy and leniency each time, somehow.
I said to my lawyer last week: strangely we (my side and the enemy) all pray to the same God, bitter with each other. May God bless us.
Strange, isn't it?

@Studebaker史刁碧嘉:Recently I had my tongue hurt when eating a lamb, it's so painful! I will have to deal with it first and can't work as normal now, thank you for handling the forum management these days. By the way I've arrived in a country colder than the Netherlands, guess what it is.

@Nederland:
Actually, I originally asked those questions because I failed to understand how you could simultaneously be a progressive, a Muslim, and a 葱轮TV user. At first glance, the values represented by those three don't seem to be very compatible with each other. Here is an example (๑◔‿◔๑):
https://h.pincong.rocks/2294754
Aren't empathy, mercy and other emotions subjective? You and I may empathize with opposing sides in a conflict. How can they be used to "know" the one and only moral truth?
I'm afraid your understanding of that concept in Christianity is incorrect. In Christianity, all humans are wicked or sinful is not due to stupidity, but due to the original sin, which in turn is due to man's disobedience (of God's will).
What do you see as the shortcomings of analytic philosophy, given your divergence from professional philosophers?

@游民:Hello, long time no see, I saw your two replies to me and found that we might have misunderstood each other a bit more, which is a big joke made by God. You see, I actually wanted to point out that I am different from philosophers, so unlike when working with them, you need a different language and a varied way of thinking to understand me, just like you need a Polish recipe when planning to make a dish of pierogies, while you need a Chinese recipe when fortune cookies are of your interest. However, probably you got something else, that I don't have knowledge about analytic philosophy, I think the overall shortcomings of such discipline shall be accented, and I even think less of your wisdom for using some ideas from it. No, that's not the case and I would never ever disrespect a friendly stranger like that, I think you're brilliant, fella.
Now, let's talk about a couple of key points that concern your both replies. First, contrary to human intuition, moral and even sometimes aesthetic truths are objective in my theory, although people do think in multiple ways, and individuals' access to them doesn't change because of it. When you see a moral phenomenon, like child labor is brutal or something, what you observe and have in mind is not "I think child labor is brutal" but "child labor is brutal", although it's a fact that you think child labor is brutal, and it's objective, because once child labor shows the property of being brutal, it ain't no "something not brutal". Let's say, I, a random guy, don't agree that child labor is brutal, it doesn't change that child labor is brutal, and you should insist what you see. Even if the rest of human civilization go against you, just ignore them and hold your ground, that child labor is brutal. Except for this, although no longer useful to determine whether moral facts are objective, humans' highly common ability to feel does exist, if we go deep into some basic functioning of human sentiments, we have an astonishingly large similarity, despite vividly we're so diverse on the level of sophisticated ideas, like human right theories, facts from which depend on largely prior observations and inferring, and a tiny difference at the beginning can result in a major gap between individuals. By the way, in one system of morality, opposite sides in a conflict are possible be sympathized with at the same time, it doesn't necessarily involve logical contradiction, I'm just saying.
Second, about that test and trick stuff, you said that I'm evil and those tested by me were in fact accusing me of the right thing. Well, let me explain. Even if what I did proves I am evil and cunning, is what they accused me of simply this type of evil and cunning? No, they assumed I was evil and cunning on an aspect more directly related to leftist policies and more common for people to think of, and they alleged that I treated them pretty unfairly on very specific issues, like, I discriminated them and made extra punishments for their criticism against my own social groups, Muslims and LGBT+ for instance. Those are totally FAKE and out of nowhere, so they weren't making accusations against me that I deserved. Now please take a second glimpse on my situation, was I really evil and cunning, that is to say, was I having beef with folks and desiring to persecute them? No, as I already said, they INSULTED me first, very strongly, and what I posed as a first step of the test, was always a will to bring kindness back together, or to make a peace deal(although it's in a test, it doesn't change the fact I genuinely wanted these), and they didn't take it as an olive branch. Instead, they took my words of good will as hypocrisy, and made a great number of false moral accusations against me, some of which were really vulgar. If you see yourself treated like this, wouldn't you consider it a further insult? If I did nothing to fight back, would that be fair for everyone? Even now that as I told you I utilized some psychological strategies against them, I always welcomed them to go back to peace and have at least a bit of mercy for me, and the driven force drew them from these was never my offense but their will to bully me. Here's an example, for you to better see the whole process:
(attention, I talked with the OP in the reply section first, then we moved to the discussion section, where you can see we already had been in a conflict by the time we started to chat there)
https://pincong.rocks/question/61219
And for the reason why I am in Conglun TV, I would say, I don't agree with users there at all, but I hope to make some dialogs to enhance their participation in Pincong(an online game of democracy simulator) and act like an FBI agent to be cool. That's it. Have a nice day.

@游民:Oh pardon my forgetfulness, you see, for the Christianity part, it's not valid to deny something as a cause just because you find something else also fits as a cause, and Christians do explain mankind's evil nature in different dimensions. What you said about the original sin is correct, but many Christians think that sin is passed down from Adam&Eva, and we ourselves are born with the original sin, not caused by disobedience of God. Driven by the original sin, we use our limited wisdom(which is compared to His Highest) to stay away from God, and we're too stupid to fully understand justice, which is equal to say, we're wicked(we use very imperfect version of moral, and our wickedness exists in the form of all kind of ideas and impulses instead of the sin itself), thus we have to cling to God. So what I talked about, the wickedness is different from the sin, although the latter is partly the cause of the former, and our stupidity is also the cause of wickedness. This kind of view is heard from many of my Christian family members and also many famous Christian figures, Jordan Peterson and William Lane Craig for example.

answers.contents:
这个电影我想不起来太多，我记得，有性虐（打屁股），有一个连体的亚裔男孩被拍照，我还记得有各种奇怪的俱乐部，但是别的我不记得了。 但是很显然，我在看了简介之后模糊得觉得，这个电影里展现了许多的邪恶。

这是多么黑不见底的邪恶，以至于能够让光明暗淡，或者像黑洞一样吸收记忆？

discussions.content: 他们不是连体的，但拍照的效果最后是成为那样。"Liza, Ya Lyublyu Ty"我仍记得其中一个亚裔男孩和女主角告别时的遗憾。

我就发现一个很奇怪的事情，他们拍照的时候是连体的，但平时有的时候却能两个人错开？
而且故事的叙事非常奇异，结尾的部分一下在拍Liza在通往东方列车上欢快地玩耍，一下在拍她在圣彼得堡的悲伤的街道走路，然后进入一个妓院等人来打她的屁股。我都没理解故事的逻辑是什么。

@Nederland:我的记忆很模糊了，我记得他们看上去是连体的，
好像还有个摄影师猎奇去拍摄他们的身体（就像是1880s的马戏团到处展出侏儒一样），有没有展现裸体和连接的地方我不记得了，
和女主角道别？ Liza？ 我一点都不记得了。
我这周拿到了我的智力报告，诊断结果是我有一个比较罕见的ADHD变种，而且记忆力极差（和以前的测试结果一样），现在我无论如何也想不起来这个电影的细节，我怀疑我的ADHD和极差的记忆力是我青少年时期遭受过多创伤的无意识自我保护..... 天哪。
但是你，却看懂了，记住了这个电影，受到了感情折磨？！ 我觉得很抱歉..... 我本来以为，你看到之后会对那个时代有所更多的了解，但是不知道会造成这么大的困扰.  而且这个潘多拉魔盒被打开，
once it is seen, it cannot be unseen....
(◕︿◕✿)
